opsworks.app.sslconfiguration.Certificat.Docs: The contents of the certificate's domain.crt file.

opsworks.app.sslconfiguration.Chain.Docs: Optional. Can be used to specify an intermediate certificate authority key or client authentication.

opsworks.app.sslconfiguration.PrivateKey.Docs: The private key; the contents of the certificate's domain.kex file.
